title: Fletcher's Trestle - Archery Mod
description:
Fletcher’s Trestle overhauls Minecraft’s archery by replacing the basic crafting table bow with a modular system. From the raw log to the perfect release, every step of the process is in your hands.
Modular bows, crossbows, arrows, in the palm of your hand
body:
The Path of the Bowyer:

    Carve: Use the Shaving Horse and a Drawknife to strip logs into Rough Limbs.

    Steam: Place your limbs into the Steam Box over a campfire. Use water to steam them into Pliable Limbs, ready for shaping.

    Assemble: Head to the fletching table to combine your limbs with a Riser and String.

    Tuning Minigame: Master the assembly minigame—your precision during the "Sweet Spot" determines the final quality and performance of your bow.

Key Features:

    66 Unique Combinations: Mix and match 10 wood types (including Crimson, Warped, and Mangrove) with 3 Riser tiers (Wood, Iron, Copper) and 2 String types. (More coming ;D)

    Immersive Workstations: Fully custom 3D models designed to fit perfectly into the vanilla aesthetic.

    Parallel Processing: The Steam Box handles up to 16 items at once—if you can keep the water level up!

    Fully Configurable: Adjust minigame speed, difficulty, and quality multipliers to suit your playstyle.
